description: Clean up your Zotero library by moving exactly these four papers to the Trash: 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies' (Einstein, 1905), 'Molecular Structure of Nucleic Acids: A Structure for Deoxyribose Nucleic Acid' (Watson & Crick, 1953), 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication' (Shannon & Weaver, 1949 - the book version, not the 1948 paper), and 'An Unsolvable Problem of Elementary Number Theory' (Church, 1936). All other papers must remain in the library. Do not empty the trash.

target_trash_titles: On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies
Molecular Structure of Nucleic Acids: A Structure for Deoxyribose Nucleic Acid
An Unsolvable Problem of Elementary Number Theory
